seed_problem: Frontier-CS cant_be_late offline / ALE-Bench spot-vs-on-demand replay
mutation: composite: replace the online single-job deadline goal with an offline multi-tower minimum-cost coverage objective, and restrict output with a shared per-step ranger-crew capacity K (turning a per-item sort into a resource-constrained covering problem)
title: Fire-Season Watchtower Staffing (Offline Replay)
strategies: do-nothing baseline: leave every tower idle and pay full fire-risk liability
per-tower spot greedy: staff spot at every available step until R_i met, ignoring price and rangers
value-aware allocation: use spot only when spot[t] < lambda_i, then allocate the scarce ranger crew to the highest-liability towers still short (only when lambda_i > D), else accept the penalty
local search / swap improvement over an initial assignment (reassign expensive spot cells to rangers or idle when it lowers F)
